product_updates.title: AI search startups are blowing up
product_updates.content: AI search has quietly become one of the most attractive targets in consumer AI.

product_updates.title: Stability AI releases a new audio model that can create six-minute songs
product_updates.content: Stability Audio 3.0 small model can run on-device and generate two-minute long tracks

product_updates.title: NanoClaw creator turns down $20M buyout offer, raises $12M seed instead
product_updates.content: NanoCo, the company behind OpenClaw alternative NanoClaw, has raised a $12 million seed after a viral launch, the founders tell TechCrunch.

product_updates.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in one week: Window to nominate and apply for the most promising startups ends May 27
product_updates.content: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27. Pitch at TechCrunch Disrupt, get investor access, win $100K, plus more scaling perks. Nominate an early-stage founder or submit your startup here.

product_updates.title: Figma adds an AI assistant to its collaborative canvas
product_updates.content: Figma's new AI assistant will be first available on Figma Design

technical_breakthroughs.title: Green steel startup Boston Metal is doubling down on critical metals
technical_breakthroughs.content: The startup Boston Metal has raised a $75 million funding round to produce critical metals, MIT Technology Review can exclusively report. The company has been known largely for its efforts to clean up steel production, an industry that’s responsible for about 8% of global greenhouse emissions tod…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: fully artificial chicken eggs and why Musk lost
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology.
